examples: It flows down the sea shelf and out into the abyssal plain much like a river on land.
Featuring these conditions, the abyssal plain is an ideal location to store liquefied carbon dioxide.
The French navy has built an abyssal bathyscaphe to take three men to the floor of the Marianas Trench.
Boris Worm says that's not surprising given how little we know about the abyssal plain.
He whispered in his original language, the one he rarely used, so glottal, abyssal.
